__doc__: Copy this file to the ROOT of any repo as `.claude-guard.json` to protect sensitive paths from auto-merge. Merge Bot refuses to auto-merge any PR that changes a file matching one of these globs: it removes the `automerge` label, adds `needs-owner`, comments which path was hit, and (if configured) sends a Telegram ping — a human must then review and merge. Globs are minimatch-style: `*` matches within one path segment, `**` matches across directories, `?` matches a single character. Remove this `__doc__` key in real files or leave it — it is ignored.
